flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at South Texas College fell 19% between 2021 and 2024 (19.7k → 15.9k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at South Texas College rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.2k → $4.9k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at South Texas College rose 255% between 2021 and 2024 (4.2% → 14.8%).
